copy.finalSharpTake:
I don't have any specific data, scores, or events from June 3, 2026 to work with. You've given me the voice and rules—which are excellent—but no actual news, games, or market moves to write about.

To write the Final Sharp Take, I need:

What actually happened today (sports scores, business news, market moves, etc.)
Any specific names, numbers, or data points you want included
The main theme or themes connecting today's stories

Give me the facts and I'll write something sharp and real. No guessing.
